prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约73→85→163→81→88，2023年因专业组调整出现异常高位163，2024年恢复至81，2025年小幅后移至88；近两年基准位次在81–88 区间窄幅波动，2025年基准约88名；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2022年6人，2023年5人，2024年4人，2025年5人；2026年计划大幅扩至27人，较2025年扩 招440%，为近年最大幅度扩招，显著降低竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流（A类）；软科主榜2021年第6名，2022–2026年稳居第5名，全国顶尖层次；2025年声誉评价偏正面（新闻传播学A++等重大荣誉）；2026年声誉评价偏负面（师德师风、学校管理类事件共14条，负面5条），但整体关注度仍高；抖音热度总排名第4（ 高热），短视频曝光量极大；历史投档异常方面2022年河南理科投档线暴跌属中关注信号，但甘肃省未出现类似断档；A-及以上共27个学科，其中数学A+、物理 学A+、化学A、生物学A+、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A等与物理类招生专业（工科试验班、理科试验班、数据科学等）高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息/通信、电气工程等2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与复旦物理类工科试验班（人工智能、微电子、集成电路等）方向吻合；本省2026年考生总数218700人，按 近年物理类占比约67.5%估算约147600人，较2025年物理类121443人增长约21.5%，竞争基数扩大；复旦大学位于上海（非本省） ，甘肃省招生占比极小（2025年约0.5%），跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次88名、2026年招生计划从5人扩至27人（扩招440%）、本省 考生增长约21.5%及复旦持续高热关注度，扩招效应远大于考生增幅，位次预计大幅后移；预测最低位次约310名，区间274–346名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（相辉学堂香农计划）
- 理科试验班（相辉学堂相辉计划）
- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖人才试验班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数据科学与大数据技术（含英才班）
- 工科试验班（智能机器人与先进制造创新学院）
- 经济管理试验班（统计、运筹与AI）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（生物医学工程与技术创新学院）
- 生物科学类（生物科学、生物技术、生态学）
- 物理学类（物理学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类大幅扩招至27人，位次预计后移至310名左右，建议位次在274–346名区间内的考生积极报考；位次优于区间下限（274名以内）可重点冲刺一档相辉学堂香农/相辉 计划及计算机拔尖班；位次在区间中段以二档数据科学、智能机器人、经济管理试验班为主；位次接近区间上限可考虑三档生物医学工程、生物科学类保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 73 → 85 → 163 → 81 → 88. In 2023, an abnormal high of 163 occurred due to major group adjustments, recovered to 81 in 2024, and slightly shifted to 88 in 2025. In the past two years, the baseline ranking fluctuated narrowly between 81 and 88, with a 2025 baseline of about 88. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2022, 5 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 27 students, a 440% increase from 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly reducing competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class (Category A); ranked 6th in the main list of Soft Science in 2021, and steadily 5th from 2022 to 2026, at the national top level. In 2025, reputation evaluation was relatively positive (major honors such as Journalism and Communication A++). In 2026, reputation evaluation was relatively negative (14 incidents related to teacher ethics and school management, 5 negative), but overall attention remains high. Douyin heat ranks 4th overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure. In terms of historical admission anomalies, the 2022 Henan science admission line plummeted, which is a medium-attention signal, but no similar drop occurred in Gansu Province. There are 27 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A, Biology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A, etc., highly correlated with physics category enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class, Data Science, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, etc., have been continuously highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, aligning with Fudan's physics category Engineering Experimental Class (artificial intelligence, microelectronics, integrated circuits, etc.). In 2026, the total number of provincial examinees is 218,700, with an estimated 147,600 in the physics category based on the recent proportion of about 67.5%, an increase of about 21.5% from 121,443 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Fudan University is located in Shanghai (not in this province), and the proportion of enrollment in Gansu Province is very small (about 0.5% in 2025), so cross-provincial application enthusiasm is limited by regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 88, the 2026 enrollment plan expanding from 5 to 27 students (440% increase), the provincial examinee growth of about 21.5%, and Fudan's sustained high attention, the expansion effect far outweighs the examinee increase, and the ranking is expected to significantly shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 310, with a range of 274–346.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan)
- Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (including Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Robotics and Advanced Manufacturing Innovation College)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Statistics, Operations Research and AI)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biomedical Engineering and Technology Innovation College)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology, Ecology)
- Physics (Physics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the physics category significantly expands to 27 students, with the ranking expected to shift to around 310. Candidates with rankings in the range of 274–346 are advised to actively apply. Those with rankings better than the lower limit (within 274) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Xianghui Academy Shannon/Xianghui Plan and Computer Top Talent Class. Those in the middle of the range should mainly consider Tier 2 Data Science, Intelligent Robotics, and Economics and Management Experimental Class. Those near the upper limit of the range can consider Tier 3 Biomedical Engineering and Biological Sciences as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 37 → 43 → (no data for 2023) → 64 → 53, fluctuating within the range of 37–64; in 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform (history category), the ranking shifted back to 64, and in 2025 it rebounded to 53, showing a forward trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 53 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 8 people from 2021 to 2022, 8 people in 2024, and 12 people in 2025; the 2026 plan is 12 people, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class (Category A); ranked 6th in the 2021 Soft Science Main Ranking, and steadily 5th from 2022 to 2026, at the national top level; reputation evaluation in 2025 is relatively positive (major honors such as A++ in Journalism and Communication); reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively negative (14 incidents related to teacher ethics and school management, 5 negative), but overall attention remains high; Douyin heat total ranking 4th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure; in terms of historical admission anomalies, the 2022 Henan liberal arts admission line plummeted as a medium attention signal, but no similar discontinuities occurred in Gansu Province; a total of 27 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Chinese Language and Literature, A+ in Journalism and Communication, A+ in Philosophy, A+ in Political Science, A- in Law, A in Sociology, etc., highly related to history category enrollment majors (Journalism and Communication, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Social Science Experimental Class, Economics).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese Language/Chinese is recommended, Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics is divided and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 218,700, estimated at about 71,078 based on the recent history category proportion of about 32.5%, an increase of about 21.8% compared to the 2025 history category of 58,374, expanding the competition base; Fudan University is located in Shanghai (not in the province), with a very small enrollment proportion in Gansu Province (about 0.5% in 2025), and cross-province application popularity is limited by regional preference. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 53, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged (12 people), a provincial candidate increase of about 21.8%, and Fudan's sustained high heat attention, the increase in candidates leads to intensified competition, and the ranking is expected to move forward slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 48, with a range of 42–54.
